name: kai
description: Route Eidos founder-ops and company-building work through the local Kai CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Use Kai to run Eidos founder-ops and company-building workflows.
interface.longDescription: Kai is the internal Eidos AGI founder-ops multitool. It gives Codex a progressive-reveal path for company procedures, platform guardrails, Slack operations, deploy routing, idea capture, and Kai feedback without duplicating the CLI's operating model in prompt memory.
defaultPrompt: Use Kai to route this company-building task.
Ask Kai for the right founder-ops guardrail.
Use Kai to capture this company idea.
